name: /incident --dry-run short-circuits before any incident directory or FAILURE-LOG entry is written per the §2.14 dry-run contract
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/incident.sh" 'preview only' --date 2026-05-25 --dry-run 2>err.txt && [ ! -d incidents ] && [ ! -f FAILURE-LOG.md ] && grep -q 'dry-run' err.txt && echo skipped 1>&2
